name: heading_hint

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.10 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] A non-adjacent ［＃「序章」は中見出し］ cannot promote a bare line; it degrades to a structured hidden heading-hint carrying the level. Offsets from the §3 byte model; not read back from a processor.

source:
序章
本文
［＃「序章」は中見出し］
